hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *) HINTS=''; [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && HINTS="$HINTS graphify: Knowledge graph exists at graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md — check it before grepping raw files."; [ -d wiki ] && HINTS="$HINTS wiki: Accumulated findings at wiki/index.md — check if this question is already answered."; [ -n "$HINTS" ] && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"TOKEN EFFICIENCY:$HINTS Use query_local_llm MCP tool for bulk code generation instead of writing it yourself.\"}}" || true ;; esac

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Try graphify query or graphify path before globbing — the knowledge graph may already have the structural answer."}}' || true

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Try graphify query before grepping — the knowledge graph indexes relationships that grep cannot find."}}' || true
